title: Acrylic Paint Set 24 Colours Canvas Paints Kit with 3 Paint Brushes for Crafts,Kids Paints, Paper, Rock Painting, Wood,Ceramic & Fabric Vibrant Colors (24 X 12ML)
features: Professional Quality: High-pigment acrylic paints offer vivid colours with buttery consistency, excellent coverage, and a glossy finish.

ENVIRONMENT FRIENDLY SPECIALLY SELECTED PREMIUM RAW MATERIALS that cause NO HARMFULL effects to our beautiful BLUE PLANET(ASTM D-4236 and EN71-3 (CE) certified.) Rich, Vivid Pigments, Certified Safe & Non-Toxic. We are not just Premium and Art Friendly but Environment friendly too;FIRST OF ITS KIND!!!
Perfect for Blending: Achieve intense, light-resistant colours with our thick, blendable paints that retain texture and ensure durability.
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for various surfaces including Canvas, Paper, Wood, Fabric, Leather, Cardboard, Ceramics, MDF and more. Easily washable with soap and water, PLUS INCLUDES 3 brushes.
